_comment: Project-local credentials for MaidsClaw providers. Copy to config/auth.json and fill in real values. This file is gitignored.

credentials._comment: Moonshot Platform metered API key — pay-per-token (replaces MOONSHOT_API_KEY env var)
Alibaba Cloud DashScope / Bailian API key — used for bailian/text-embedding-v4 and other bailian models (replaces DASHSCOPE_API_KEY env var)
Kimi for Coding — subscription-based API key (replaces KIMI_CODING_API_KEY env var)
MiniMax API key (replaces MINIMAX_API_KEY env var)
OpenAI ChatGPT Codex OAuth token (manually obtained from Codex CLI login). HIGH RISK: undocumented endpoint.
Anthropic Claude Pro/Max OAuth via setup-token (run 'claude setup-token' to obtain). HIGH RISK: may violate Anthropic ToS.

gateway._comment: Gateway bearer tokens for dashboard/cockpit routes. Keep separate from provider credentials[].
